C G I M O P S T 

C

colorName - Static variable in interface io.github.thatgarlicdude.pacio.io.PacROMSetFilenames
The filename for the color.bin entry.

G

getColorData() - Method in class io.github.thatgarlicdude.pacio.io.PacROMSet
Gets the PacROMSet.colorData, a byte array that has the byte data from the PCB's color ROM.
getColorName() - Method in interface io.github.thatgarlicdude.pacio.io.PacROMSetFilenames
Gets the PacROMSetFilenames.colorName, which is the filename of the color.bin entry.
getColorROMNames() - Method in class io.github.thatgarlicdude.pacio.catalog.PacCatalog
Gets a copied list of the color ROM filenames in the catalog.
getGraphicData() - Method in class io.github.thatgarlicdude.pacio.io.PacROMSet
Gets the PacROMSet.graphicData, a byte array that has all the byte data from the PCB's graphic ROMs.
getGraphicName() - Method in interface io.github.thatgarlicdude.pacio.io.PacROMSetFilenames
Gets the PacROMSetFilenames.graphicName, which is the filename of the graphic.bin entry.
getGraphicROMNames() - Method in class io.github.thatgarlicdude.pacio.catalog.PacCatalog
Gets a copied list of the graphic ROM filenames in the catalog.
getMysteryData() - Method in class io.github.thatgarlicdude.pacio.io.PacROMSet
Gets the PacROMSet.mysteryData, a byte array that has the byte data from the PCB's mystery ROM.
getMysteryName() - Method in interface io.github.thatgarlicdude.pacio.io.PacROMSetFilenames
Gets the PacROMSetFilenames.mysteryName, which is the filename of the mystery.bin entry.
getMysteryROMNames() - Method in class io.github.thatgarlicdude.pacio.catalog.PacCatalog
Gets a copied list of the mystery ROM filenames in the catalog.
getPacCatalog(int) - Static method in class io.github.thatgarlicdude.pacio.catalog.PacCatalogManager
Returns a specific PacCatalog object from the list using an index.
getPacCatalogs() - Static method in class io.github.thatgarlicdude.pacio.catalog.PacCatalogManager
Returns a copied list of PacCatalog objects.
getPaletteData() - Method in class io.github.thatgarlicdude.pacio.io.PacROMSet
Gets the PacROMSet.paletteData, a byte array that has the byte data from the PCB's palette ROM.
getPaletteName() - Method in interface io.github.thatgarlicdude.pacio.io.PacROMSetFilenames
Gets the PacROMSetFilenames.paletteName, which is the filename of the palette.bin entry.
getPaletteROMNames() - Method in class io.github.thatgarlicdude.pacio.catalog.PacCatalog
Gets a copied list of the palette ROM filenames in the catalog.
getProgramData() - Method in class io.github.thatgarlicdude.pacio.io.PacROMSet
Gets the PacROMSet.programData, a byte array that has all the byte data from the PCB's program ROMs.
getProgramName() - Method in interface io.github.thatgarlicdude.pacio.io.PacROMSetFilenames
Gets the PacROMSetFilenames.programName, which is the filename of the program.bin entry.
getProgramROMNames() - Method in class io.github.thatgarlicdude.pacio.catalog.PacCatalog
Gets a copied list of the program ROM filenames in the catalog.
getSoundData() - Method in class io.github.thatgarlicdude.pacio.io.PacROMSet
Gets the PacROMSet.soundData, a byte array that has the byte data from the PCB's sound ROM.
getSoundName() - Method in interface io.github.thatgarlicdude.pacio.io.PacROMSetFilenames
Gets the PacROMSetFilenames.soundName, which is the filename of the sound.bin entry.
getSoundROMNames() - Method in class io.github.thatgarlicdude.pacio.catalog.PacCatalog
Gets a copied list of the sound ROM filenames in the catalog.
graphicName - Static variable in interface io.github.thatgarlicdude.pacio.io.PacROMSetFilenames
The filename for the graphic.bin entry.

I

importROMSet() - Method in class io.github.thatgarlicdude.pacio.io.PacROMSetImporter
Imports an existing Pac-Man ROM set ZIP file from disk to a PacROMSet object to memory, which are unified ROM sets.
importROMSet(String) - Static method in class io.github.thatgarlicdude.pacio.PacIO
Imports an existing Pac-Man ROM set into a PacROMSet instance, which is the unified version of the said ROM set.
io.github.thatgarlicdude.pacio - package io.github.thatgarlicdude.pacio
A Java library for accessing Pac-Man ROM sets and opening, saving, and modifying unified ROM sets.
io.github.thatgarlicdude.pacio.catalog - package io.github.thatgarlicdude.pacio.catalog
The catalog package of the PacIO library.
io.github.thatgarlicdude.pacio.io - package io.github.thatgarlicdude.pacio.io
The IO package of the PacIO library.

M

mysteryName - Static variable in interface io.github.thatgarlicdude.pacio.io.PacROMSetFilenames
The filename for the mystery.bin entry.

O

openROMSet() - Method in class io.github.thatgarlicdude.pacio.io.PacROMSetOpener
Opens the unified ROM set from disk.
openROMSet(String) - Static method in class io.github.thatgarlicdude.pacio.PacIO
Opens an existing unified Pac-Man ROM set ZIP file to memory.

P

PacCatalog - Class in io.github.thatgarlicdude.pacio.catalog
An abstract class that represents as a categorized list of ROM file names.
PacCatalog(String[], String[], String[], String[], String[], String[]) - Constructor for class io.github.thatgarlicdude.pacio.catalog.PacCatalog
Constructs an instance of the PacCatalog.
PacCatalogManager - Class in io.github.thatgarlicdude.pacio.catalog
The a class used for managing PacCatalog objects.
PacIO - Class in io.github.thatgarlicdude.pacio
The main class of the PacIO library.
PacManCatalog - Class in io.github.thatgarlicdude.pacio.catalog
A class that represents a categorized list of the ROM file names in the Pac-Man ROM set.
PacManCatalog() - Constructor for class io.github.thatgarlicdude.pacio.catalog.PacManCatalog
Constructs an instance of the Pac-Man catalog.
PacROMSet - Class in io.github.thatgarlicdude.pacio.io
A class that represents a unified Pac-Man ROM set.
PacROMSet(byte[], byte[], byte[], byte[], byte[], byte[]) - Constructor for class io.github.thatgarlicdude.pacio.io.PacROMSet
Constructs an instance of the unified Pac-Man ROM set.
PacROMSetFilenames - Interface in io.github.thatgarlicdude.pacio.io
An interface containing filenames for a unified Pac-Man ROM-set.
PacROMSetImporter - Class in io.github.thatgarlicdude.pacio.io
A class used to import the Pac-Man ROM set ZIP files to PacROMSet objects, which represent as digital, unified ROM sets in memory.
PacROMSetImporter(String) - Constructor for class io.github.thatgarlicdude.pacio.io.PacROMSetImporter
Constructs an instance of the ROM set importer.
PacROMSetOpener - Class in io.github.thatgarlicdude.pacio.io
A class used to open unified Pac-Man ROM set ZIP files from disk.
PacROMSetOpener(String) - Constructor for class io.github.thatgarlicdude.pacio.io.PacROMSetOpener
Constructs an instance of the unified ROM set opener.
PacROMSetSaver - Class in io.github.thatgarlicdude.pacio.io
A class used to save unified Pac-Man ROM sets.
PacROMSetSaver(PacROMSet, String) - Constructor for class io.github.thatgarlicdude.pacio.io.PacROMSetSaver
Constructs an instance of the unified ROM set saver.
paletteName - Static variable in interface io.github.thatgarlicdude.pacio.io.PacROMSetFilenames
The filename for the palette.bin entry.
programName - Static variable in interface io.github.thatgarlicdude.pacio.io.PacROMSetFilenames
The filename for the program.bin entry.
PuckManCatalog - Class in io.github.thatgarlicdude.pacio.catalog
A class that represents a categorized list of the ROM file names in the Puck-Man ROM set.
PuckManCatalog() - Constructor for class io.github.thatgarlicdude.pacio.catalog.PuckManCatalog
Constructs an instance of the Puck-Man catalog.

S

saveROMSet() - Method in class io.github.thatgarlicdude.pacio.io.PacROMSetSaver
Saves the unified ROM set to disk.
saveROMSet(String, PacROMSet) - Static method in class io.github.thatgarlicdude.pacio.PacIO
Saves the unified Pac-Man ROM set to disk as a ZIP file.
soundName - Static variable in interface io.github.thatgarlicdude.pacio.io.PacROMSetFilenames
The filename for the sound.bin entry.

T

TestCatalog - Class in io.github.thatgarlicdude.pacio.catalog
A class that represents a categorized list of the ROM file names in the test ROM set.
TestCatalog() - Constructor for class io.github.thatgarlicdude.pacio.catalog.TestCatalog
Constructs an instance of the test catalog.
